passage.title: A Day with About To
passage.text: The train is about to leave. I am about to go to sleep. She is about to speak. It is about to rain. The meeting is about to start. I am about to leave home. She is about to cry. We are about to eat food. The sun is about to set. I am about to make this decision.
passage.hindiTranslation: ट्रेन अभी छूटने वाली है। मैं अभी सोने वाला हूँ। वह अभी बोलने वाली है। बारिश अभी शुरू होने वाली है। मीटिंग अभी शुरू होने वाली है। मैं अभी घर से निकलने वाला हूँ। वह अभी रोने वाली है। हम अभी खाना खाने वाले हैं। सूरज अभी डूबने वाला है। मैं अभी यह decision लेने वाला हूँ।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The train is about..."?
options: We are about to eat food.
I was about to make this mistake, but I stopped.
I am about to go to sleep.
The train is about to leave.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: The train is about to leave.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "The train is about to leave."
